heading: Overseas Private Investment Corporation
label: 3304 Overseas Private Investment Corporation
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a), was repealed by , , .Section 2191 of this titlePub. L. 115–254, div. F, title VI, § 1464(2)132 Stat. 3513Oct. 5, 2018
Effective DateSection effective as of , see , set out as a note under .January 1, 1979section 18 of Pub. L. 96–8section 3301 of this title

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions, personnel, assets, and liabilities of the Overseas Private Investment Corporation to the United States International Development Finance Corporation and treatment of related references, see sections 9683 and 9686(d) of this title.

children.heading: Removal of per capita income restriction on Corporation activities with respect to investment projects on Taiwan
children.label: a Removal of per capita income restriction on Corporation activities with respect to investment projects on Taiwan
children.text: During the three-year period beginning on , the $1,000 per capita income restriction in clause (2) of the second undesignated paragraph of section 2191 of this title shall not restrict the activities of the Overseas Private Investment Corporation in determining whether to provide any insurance, reinsurance, loans, or guaranties with respect to investment projects on Taiwan.April 10, 19791See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Application by Corporation of other criteria
children.label: b Application by Corporation of other criteria
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (a) of this section, in issuing insurance, reinsurance, loans, or guaranties with respect to investment projects on Taiwan, the Overseas Private Insurance Corporation shall apply the same criteria as those applicable in other parts of the world.2So in original. Probably should be “Investment”.2
